title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions family as a Risk Analyst in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
